extra.reason: Implemented ahead of Phase 0 sign-off (7cc.3 field-test, 7cc.5 approval) per Dan's direct request.
mealie_public_url setting added; all browser links use it via settings.mealie_link_url(); API calls unchanged on base URL; setup wizard has both fields.
Recipes tab live: browse/search, URL import (Mealie scraper + LLM fallback), photo import via vision LLM, manual entry, shared review editor. extract_recipe on all 4 providers.
